name: string
core_id: the core item conceptual id like scepter_of_justice - this should not change between upgrades, even if title changes
legendariness: 1-100 how amazing are the achievements that justified the forging of this item
emoji: the emoji that most closely resembles the item
emoji_accent: an additional emoji to embellish the item with, flavor
upgrades_previous: The core_id of the item we are upgrading, if any
